category_sources: Official NNG site describes it as a lightweight, broker-less messaging library.
source_facts.description says nanomsg-next-generation lightweight brokerless messaging.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading uses NNG; GitHub README expands it as nanomsg-next-gen.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains a docs directory.
Official README documents project purpose, build requirements, and API positioning.
Official homepage provides introduction and quick start.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/nanomsg/nng; per instruction, not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists messaging patterns such as publish/subscribe and request/reply.
